claims.summary: When telemetry and sensory ages are present but not stale, reciprocity should report bidirectional_waiting_messages instead of unpredictable fallthrough.
pressure_trend_samples_v1 should remain bounded under high-frequency telemetry.
The no-recent to stale transition should respect the current dynamic stale window.
Changing reciprocity stale windows or websocket cadence would be live bridge behavior authority.
